name: NCS&A Co., Ltd.
summary: NCS&A Co., Ltd. provides various IT services in Japan. It offers system development and construction services, as well as sells system equipment. The company also provides platform solutions, including visualization, business, and security solutions; migration, outsourcing, cloud, and AI tools and services; and geospatial information software, etc. In addition, it offers industry/task solutions for financial and medical services, public sector, manufacturing, distribution, hotel/restaurant, nursing care, etc. NCS&A Co., Ltd. was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
